avoid_exercises: Deadlift, Barbell Squat, Good Morning, Leg Press (heavy), Hyperextension, Sit-ups
phase1_rehab: Rest 24-48h. Ice 15-20 min every 2-3h. Gentle knee-to-chest stretches (3×20s). Cat-cow mobility (3×10 reps). Diaphragmatic breathing.
phase2_rehab: Bird-dog (3×10), Glute bridge (3×15), Dead bug (3×10), Walking 20-30 min/day. Avoid loaded flexion.
phase3_return: Bodyweight squat, Romanian deadlift with light weight, Progressive loading over 4-6 weeks.
recommended_supplements: Magnesium glycinate 400mg (muscle relaxation), Turmeric 500mg (anti-inflammatory), Fish oil 2-3g EPA+DHA
red_flags: Pain radiating below knee, bladder/bowel dysfunction → immediate medical attention.
source: ACSM Guidelines; Physiopedia Lower Back Pain Protocol

avoid_exercises: All spinal flexion (crunches, sit-ups, bent-over rows), Deadlift, Heavy squat, Leg press, Twisting movements, Box jumps.
phase1_rehab: McKenzie press-up (prone extension) 3×10, Walking in pool, Supine piriformis stretch, Ice/heat alternation. Consult physio.
phase2_rehab: Prone cobra, Pelvic tilt, Hip flexor stretch, Partial sit-up (only if pain-free). Core stabilization priority.
phase3_return: Gradual introduction of hip hinge pattern, Cable pull-through, Trap bar deadlift at 50% max. 8-12 week timeline.
recommended_supplements: B12 1000mcg (nerve health), Alpha-lipoic acid 600mg, Omega-3 3g, Collagen 10g
red_flags: Foot drop, saddle anaesthesia, bilateral leg weakness → emergency surgery consult.
source: McKenzie Institute; Spine Journal 2022 Conservative Management Guidelines

avoid_exercises: Heavy squats, Lunges (deep), Running (until pain-free), Seated leg curl, Hip adduction machine.
phase1_rehab: Piriformis stretch (figure-4) 3×30s, Supine hamstring stretch, Hip external rotation stretch, Walking 15-20 min.
phase2_rehab: Clamshell (3×15), Side-lying hip abduction, Glute bridge (single-leg progression), Lateral band walk.
phase3_return: Bodyweight squat, Step-up, Bulgarian split squat (light), Gradual running reintroduction.
recommended_supplements: Magnesium 400mg, Vitamin D3 2000 IU, Fish oil 2g
red_flags: MRI to rule out true disc herniation.
source: JOSPT Piriformis Syndrome Clinical Practice Guidelines 2021

avoid_exercises: Deep squats (beyond 90°), Leg extension machine, Running downhill, Lunges, Stair climbing, Plyometrics.
phase1_rehab: RICE protocol, VMO activation (quad sets), Straight leg raise, Short-arc quad, Non-weight-bearing cycling.
phase2_rehab: Mini squat (0-45°), Step-up (low), Hip strengthening (abductors/external rotators), Terminal knee extension.
phase3_return: Wall squat, Bulgarian split squat, Running at flat surface (progressive mileage), Box squat.
recommended_supplements: Glucosamine 1500mg + Chondroitin 1200mg, Collagen 10g + Vitamin C, Omega-3 2g
red_flags: Locking, giving way, significant swelling → MRI to rule out meniscal tear.
source: British Journal of Sports Medicine PFPS Guidelines 2022

avoid_exercises: All weight-bearing exercise. No pivoting, cutting, jumping. No open-chain knee extension 0-60°.
phase1_rehab: Quad sets, Straight leg raise, Ankle pumps, Heel prop extension stretching, Cryotherapy, Gait training with crutches.
phase2_rehab: Stationary cycling (week 4-6), Leg press 0-60° (week 6), Pool walking, Progressive weight-bearing.
phase3_return: Return to sport at 9-12 months minimum. Single-leg squat, Hop tests (LSI >90%), Agility drills.
recommended_supplements: Vitamin C 1000mg, Zinc 25mg, Protein 1.8-2.2g/kg/day, Creatine 5g (muscle preservation)
red_flags: Sudden effusion increase, fever, wound infection → immediate surgical consult.
source: JOSPT ACL Post-op Rehab Guidelines 2021; NICE Guidelines

avoid_exercises: Deep knee flexion, Twisting on planted foot, Running, Jumping, Squatting beyond 90°, Leg curl.
phase1_rehab: Ice, compression, elevation. Quad sets, Straight leg raise, Stationary cycling (high seat), Pool walking.
phase2_rehab: Mini squat, Step-up, Leg press (limited range), Hip strengthening. Avoid pivoting.
phase3_return: Full squat (if pain-free), Jogging (week 8-12), Return to sport at 12-16 weeks.
recommended_supplements: Glucosamine sulfate 1500mg, Collagen 10g, Boswellia 300mg
red_flags: Locking, inability to extend, persistent effusion → surgery consult.
source: Cochrane Review on Meniscal Tears 2020; Orthopedics Today

avoid_exercises: Plyometrics, Heavy loaded squats, Leg extension machine, Running, Jumping rope, Hill sprints.
phase1_rehab: Isometric leg press or wall squat (70% MVC, 5×45s, 5×/week). Ice after activity. Load reduction 50%.
phase2_rehab: Isotonic loading: Slow squats (3s concentric/3s eccentric), Spanish squat, Leg press. Gradual loading.
phase3_return: Reactive loading: Box jump (low), Running reintroduction, Sport-specific drills at 12-16 weeks.
recommended_supplements: Collagen 15g + Vitamin C 50mg (30 min pre-exercise), Omega-3 3g, Protein >1.8g/kg
red_flags: Central tendon thickening, partial rupture on ultrasound → physio-guided management.
source: Cook & Purdam Tendinopathy Model; BJSM Patellar Tendinopathy Review 2022

avoid_exercises: Overhead press, Behind-the-neck press, Upright row, Military press, Kipping pull-up, Heavy bench press.
phase1_rehab: Pendulum exercises, Scapular retraction, Active-assisted ROM. RICE. Sling if needed (Grade II).
phase2_rehab: Band external rotation (3×15), Side-lying ER, Scaption, Wall push-up, Face pull (light band).
phase3_return: Dumbbell lateral raise, Cable fly, Landmine press, DB shoulder press (neutral grip), Gradual load increase.
recommended_supplements: Fish oil 3g, Collagen 10g + Vitamin C, Curcumin 1g
red_flags: Inability to raise arm, complete tear on ultrasound → surgical evaluation.
source: AAOS Rotator Cuff Guidelines; JOSPT Shoulder Protocol 2021

avoid_exercises: Overhead press, Lateral raise above 90°, Upright row, Behind-neck exercises, Dips (wide arm), Swimming (freestyle intensive).
phase1_rehab: Scapular mobilization, Posterior capsule stretch (cross-body), Sleeper stretch, Anti-inflammatory protocol.
phase2_rehab: Rotator cuff strengthening (internal/external rotation), Serratus anterior activation, Row variations.
phase3_return: Landmine press, Cable shoulder press, Incline bench press, DB lateral raise (below 90°).
recommended_supplements: Omega-3 2-3g, Vitamin D3 2000 IU, Magnesium 300mg
red_flags: Night pain, significant loss of ROM → cortisone + imaging.
source: Neer Classification; British Shoulder & Elbow Society Guidelines

avoid_exercises: Heavy barbell curls, Preacher curl, Chin-ups (early), Overhead pulling with flexion, Hammer curl (heavy).
phase1_rehab: Eccentric bicep curl (slow 3-4s lowering, 3×15), Supination exercise, Pendulum, Scapular stabilization.
phase2_rehab: Band curl, Incline DB curl, Neutral grip pull-down, Concentric-eccentric loading progression.
phase3_return: Barbell curl, Weighted chin-up, Cable curl. Full return at 8-12 weeks.
recommended_supplements: Collagen 10g, Vitamin C 1000mg, Protein 2g/kg
red_flags: Popeye deformity (proximal biceps rupture) → surgical consult.
source: Physiopedia Biceps Tendinopathy; JOSPT Upper Extremity Protocol

avoid_exercises: Running, Jumping, HIIT, Heavy leg press, Box jump, Agility drills, Calf raise (loaded early phase).
phase1_rehab: RICE protocol (48h), Ankle alphabet, Towel scrunches, Seated calf raise, Non-weight-bearing pool walking.
phase2_rehab: Single-leg balance (30s), BOSU balance, Theraband dorsiflexion, Calf raise (bilateral), Partial jogging.
phase3_return: Lateral band walks, Agility ladder, Plyometric progression, Return to sport at 4-8 weeks.
recommended_supplements: Bromelain 500mg (swelling), Vitamin C 1g, Collagen 10g
red_flags: Bony tenderness, inability to bear weight → X-ray to rule out fracture (Ottawa Rules).
source: Ottawa Ankle Rules; JOSPT Ankle Sprain Clinical Practice Guidelines 2021

avoid_exercises: Running (barefoot/minimalist), Box jumps, Skipping, Walking on hard surfaces (prolonged), Calf raise on incline.
phase1_rehab: Plantar fascia stretch (3×30s morning), Towel toe curls, Calf eccentric drops, Ice rolling (frozen water bottle).
phase2_rehab: Intrinsic foot strengthening (short foot exercise), Calf raise eccentric (3×15), Single-leg balance, Low-impact cardio.
phase3_return: Running with supportive footwear, Gradual mileage increase (10% rule), Soft surface running.
recommended_supplements: Vitamin D3 2000 IU, Magnesium 400mg, Collagen 10g
red_flags: Sharp pain at night, sudden worsening → rule out stress fracture or nerve entrapment.
source: NICE Plantar Fasciitis Guidelines; Journal of Foot and Ankle Research 2022

avoid_exercises: Barbell wrist extension, Heavy grip exercises, Wrist curl, Reverse curl, Farmer's carry (heavy), Pull-ups (early).
phase1_rehab: Eccentric wrist extension (Tyler Twist, 3×15), Deep friction massage, Ice after activity, Counterforce brace.
phase2_rehab: Concentric wrist extension (light weight), Forearm pronation/supination, Grip strengthening (light squeezee ball).
phase3_return: Hammer curl, Reverse curl, Pull-up, Farmer's carry. Return at 8-12 weeks.
recommended_supplements: Collagen 15g + Vitamin C 50mg (30 min pre-exercise), Omega-3 3g
red_flags: Persistent pain >3 months → consider PRP injection or shockwave therapy.
source: BJSM Lateral Epicondylitis Guidelines; Nirschl Classification

avoid_exercises: Barbell wrist curl, Heavy grip work, Push-ups on extended wrist, Dips, Plank (standard), Heavy deadlift (hook grip).
phase1_rehab: Nerve gliding exercises, Wrist tendon gliding, Fist → full extension sequence. Neutral wrist splinting at night.
phase2_rehab: Wrist flexor stretch (3×30s), Scapular stability, Ergonomic modification, Low-impact cardio.
phase3_return: Fist push-ups, TRX rows, Trap bar deadlift (neutral grip), Gradual barbell introduction.
recommended_supplements: Vitamin B6 100mg, Alpha-lipoic acid 600mg, Fish oil 2g
red_flags: Thenar wasting, severe constant numbness → surgical decompression consult.
source: NICE CTS Guidelines 2023; American Academy of Orthopaedic Surgeons

avoid_exercises: Running, Sprint, Leg raise, Sit-up, Cycling (high resistance), Step-up, Deep lunge.
phase1_rehab: Standing hip flexor stretch (3×30s), Supine knee to chest, Heat after 48h, Gentle walking.
phase2_rehab: Bridge, Clamshell, Side-lying hip abduction, Dead bug (gentle), Stationary cycling (low resistance).
phase3_return: Lunge, Step-up, Squat, Running reintroduction at 4-6 weeks.
recommended_supplements: Protein 2g/kg, Omega-3 2g, Turmeric 500mg
red_flags: Snapping hip, pain with all movements → MRI to rule out labral tear.
source: Physiopedia Hip Flexor Strain; ACSM Sports Injury Guidelines

avoid_exercises: Sumo squat, Wide-stance squat, Hip adduction machine, Lateral lunge, Running (side-to-side), Soccer kicks.
phase1_rehab: RICE, Isometric adductor squeeze (pillow between knees), Gentle walking, Aquatic therapy.
phase2_rehab: Copenhagen adductor exercise (3×10), Side-lying adduction, Mini sumo squat, Light lateral lunge.
phase3_return: Sumo deadlift, Cossack squat, Lateral agility drills, Sport-specific training at 6-10 weeks.
recommended_supplements: Collagen 10g, Vitamin C 500mg, Omega-3 2g
red_flags: Inguinal hernia symptoms (bulge), osteitis pubis → specialist referral.
source: JOSPT Groin Pain Guidelines; Doha Groin Consensus 2015

avoid_exercises: Sprint, Running, Nordic curl, Romanian deadlift (heavy), Leg curl (early), Stiff-leg deadlift, Yoga forward folds.
phase1_rehab: RICE, Prone lying, Submaximal isometric hamstring contraction, Gentle hip hinge (pain-free range), Pool walking.
phase2_rehab: Nordic hamstring eccentric (3×6 — start assisted), Stability ball curl, Romanian deadlift (bodyweight), Bridging.
phase3_return: Jogging, Sprint progression, Nordic curls (unassisted), Full training at 6-12 weeks.
recommended_supplements: Protein 2.2g/kg, Omega-3 3g, Creatine 5g, Vitamin D3 2000 IU
red_flags: Proximal avulsion (ischial tuberosity), bruising tracking down leg → imaging required.
source: Askling Hamstring Protocol; BJSM Hamstring Injury Guidelines 2020

avoid_exercises: Running (initially), Plyometrics, Box jumps, Skipping rope, Sprint, Deep calf raise (early phase).
phase1_rehab: Isometric calf raise (5×45s, 2-3×/day), No passive stretching (acute phase), Ice after loading.
phase2_rehab: Alfredson eccentric heel drop protocol (3×15, twice daily on step), Concentric calf raise, Swimming.
phase3_return: Running (flat, slow pace), Plyometric introduction at 12 weeks, Full sport at 16-20 weeks.
recommended_supplements: Collagen 15g + Vitamin C 50mg (pre-exercise), Omega-3 3g, Magnesium 400mg
red_flags: Palpable gap, sudden onset severe pain → Thompson test → rule out complete rupture.
source: Alfredson Protocol; NICE Achilles Tendinopathy Guidelines; BJSM 2021

avoid_exercises: Sprint, Running, Box jump, Skipping, Aggressive calf raise, Stair climbing (fast), HIIT.
phase1_rehab: RICE, Gentle calf stretch (wall), Towel stretch, Non-weight-bearing pool exercise, Ankle dorsiflexion.
phase2_rehab: Seated calf raise (bilateral), Standing calf raise (bilateral), Stationary cycling, Gentle jogging.
phase3_return: Single-leg calf raise, Running progression, Agility drills. Return at 4-8 weeks.
recommended_supplements: Magnesium 400mg, Vitamin D3 2000 IU, Collagen 10g, Protein 2g/kg
red_flags: DVT symptoms (warmth, redness, swelling with calf pain) → urgent Doppler ultrasound.
source: Physiopedia Calf Strain; Sports Medicine Australia Protocol

avoid_exercises: Behind-neck press, Behind-neck lat pull-down, Neck bridges, Headstand, Heavy shrugs, Overhead pressing with neck tension.
phase1_rehab: Cervical retraction (chin tucks, 10×10/day), Neck rotation (active), Scapular squeezes, Heat, Postural correction.
phase2_rehab: Band face pull, Prone cobra, Deep neck flexor strengthening, Chin tuck on incline, Gentle cardio.
phase3_return: Shoulder press (neutral, dumbbell), Pull-up, Deadlift with neutral neck, Gradual heavy loading.
recommended_supplements: Vitamin D3 3000 IU, Calcium 1000mg, Omega-3 2g, B12 1000mcg
red_flags: Arm weakness, electric shock sensation on neck flexion (Lhermitte sign) → MRI immediately.
source: NICE Cervical Spondylosis Guidelines; Spine Journal 2022

avoid_exercises: Heavy asymmetric loading (e.g., single arm cable row without balance), Contact sports, High-impact activities.
phase1_rehab: Schroth method exercises (personalized breathing + positioning), Core stabilization, Swimming.
phase2_rehab: Bilateral symmetrical loading preferred, Lat pull-down (double grip), Leg press, Plank, Glute bridge.
phase3_return: Deadlift with monitoring, Squat, Pull-up (avoid over-rotation). Regular physio check-ins.
recommended_supplements: Calcium 1200mg, Vitamin D3 3000 IU, Magnesium 400mg
red_flags: Cobb angle >25° → orthopaedic review, bracing consideration.
source: SOSORT Scoliosis Exercise Guidelines 2022

avoid_exercises: Barbell wrist curl, Farmer's carry, Kettlebell swing, Wrist-intensive gripping, Heavy deadlift.
phase1_rehab: Thumb spica splint, Finkelstein stretch (gentle), Ice, Activity modification.
phase2_rehab: Radial nerve gliding, Thumb opposition exercises, Wrist stabilization, Light grip work.
phase3_return: Gradual grip loading, Trap bar deadlift (neutral), All exercises with wrist support.
recommended_supplements: Vitamin B6 100mg, Fish oil 2g, Collagen 10g
red_flags: Failure to improve with conservative care → ultrasound-guided cortisone injection.
source: AAOS De Quervain's Guidelines; Journal of Hand Surgery 2021

avoid_exercises: High-intensity training, Competition, Heavy lifting, All structured training initially.
phase1_rehab: Complete rest or active recovery only (leisurely walking, yoga). Sleep 9+ hours. Caloric surplus.
phase2_rehab: Light cardio (RPE 3-4), Mobility work, Meditation, Social activity, Gradual return to volume at 30% of baseline.
phase3_return: Progressive volume increase (10% weekly), Periodization with mandatory deload weeks, Heart rate variability (HRV) monitoring.
recommended_supplements: Ashwagandha 600mg (cortisol regulation), Zinc 25mg, Magnesium 400mg, Protein 2g/kg, Vitamin D3
red_flags: Resting HR elevated >10 bpm above baseline for >2 weeks, mood disturbances → GP evaluation.
source: European College of Sport Science OTS Consensus 2012; BJSM 2020 Update

avoid_exercises: All running, Jumping, High-impact cardio, Leg press (loaded), Calf raise. Crutches if pain on walking.
phase1_rehab: Non-weight-bearing with crutches (4-6 weeks), Pool running, Seated upper body work, Bone loading protocol (gentle).
phase2_rehab: Progressive weight-bearing, Pool jogging, Stationary cycling, Elliptical (low impact).
phase3_return: Return-to-run programme at 8-12 weeks (subject to X-ray/MRI clearance). Calcium and Vitamin D optimisation.
recommended_supplements: Calcium 1500mg, Vitamin D3 4000 IU, Vitamin K2 100mcg, Magnesium 400mg
red_flags: Night pain, bilateral tibial pain → DEXA scan (bone density), RED-S assessment.
source: BJSM Stress Fracture Management 2019; Military Orthopaedic Guidelines

avoid_exercises: Bench press, Dips, Push-up, Chest fly, Cable crossover, Pull-over, Heavy overhead press.
phase1_rehab: Ice, Arm sling if Grade II, Pendulum exercises, Gentle shoulder ROM, No active pectoral loading.
phase2_rehab: Band pull-apart, Face pull, Low cable row, Scapular retraction, Light shoulder press.
phase3_return: Push-up, Incline DB press (light), Cable chest fly, Bench press. Gradual at 6-12 weeks.
recommended_supplements: Protein 2.2g/kg, Collagen 10g, Fish oil 3g, Vitamin C 1g
red_flags: Sudden pain + pop + loss of contour → pectoral avulsion → surgical evaluation urgently.
source: AAOS Pectoral Injury Protocol; Sports Health Journal 2021

avoid_exercises: Overhead press, Lateral raise above 90°, Upright row, Behind-neck exercises, Dips (wide arm), Swimming (freestyle intensive).
phase1_rehab: Scapular mobilization, Posterior capsule stretch (cross-body), Sleeper stretch, Anti-inflammatory protocol.
phase2_rehab: Rotator cuff strengthening (internal/external rotation), Serratus anterior activation, Row variations.
phase3_return: Landmine press, Cable shoulder press, Incline bench press, DB lateral raise (below 90°).
recommended_supplements: Omega-3 2-3g, Vitamin D3 2000 IU, Magnesium 300mg
red_flags: Night pain, significant loss of ROM → cortisone + imaging.
source: Neer Classification; British Shoulder & Elbow Society Guidelines (variant)

phase1_rehab: Eccentric wrist extension (Tyler Twist, 3×15), Deep friction massage, Ice after activity, Counterforce brace.
phase2_rehab: Concentric wrist extension (light weight), Forearm pronation/supination, Grip strengthening (light squeezee ball).
phase3_return: Hammer curl, Reverse curl, Pull-up, Farmer's carry. Return at 8-12 weeks.

phase2_rehab: Nordic hamstring eccentric (3×6 — start assisted), Stability ball curl, Romanian deadlift (bodyweight), Bridging.
phase3_return: Jogging, Sprint progression, Nordic curls (unassisted), Full training at 6-12 weeks.
recommended_supplements: Protein 2.2g/kg, Omega-3 3g, Creatine 5g, Vitamin D3 2000 IU
red_flags: Proximal avulsion (ischial tuberosity), bruising tracking down leg → imaging required.
source: Askling Hamstring Protocol; BJSM Hamstring Injury Guidelines 2020 (variant)

avoid_exercises: High-intensity training, Competition, Heavy lifting, All structured training initially.
phase1_rehab: Complete rest or active recovery only (leisurely walking, yoga). Sleep 9+ hours. Caloric surplus.
phase2_rehab: Light cardio (RPE 3-4), Mobility work, Meditation, Social activity, Gradual return to volume at 30% of baseline.
phase3_return: Progressive volume increase (10% weekly), Periodization with mandatory deload weeks, Heart rate variability (HRV) monitoring.
recommended_supplements: Ashwagandha 600mg (cortisol regulation), Zinc 25mg, Magnesium 400mg, Protein 2g/kg, Vitamin D3
red_flags: Resting HR elevated >10 bpm above baseline for >2 weeks, mood disturbances → GP evaluation.
source: European College of Sport Science OTS Consensus 2012; BJSM 2020 Update (variant)

avoid_exercises: High-intensity training, Competition, Heavy lifting, All structured training initially.
phase1_rehab: Complete rest or active recovery only (leisurely walking, yoga). Sleep 9+ hours. Caloric surplus.
phase2_rehab: Light cardio (RPE 3-4), Mobility work, Meditation, Social activity, Gradual return to volume at 30% of baseline.
phase3_return: Progressive volume increase (10% weekly), Periodization with mandatory deload weeks, Heart rate variability (HRV) monitoring.

avoid_exercises: Running, Jumping, HIIT, Heavy leg press, Box jump, Agility drills, Calf raise (loaded early phase).
phase1_rehab: RICE protocol (48h), Ankle alphabet, Towel scrunches, Seated calf raise, Non-weight-bearing pool walking.
phase2_rehab: Single-leg balance (30s), BOSU balance, Theraband dorsiflexion, Calf raise (bilateral), Partial jogging.
phase3_return: Lateral band walks, Agility ladder, Plyometric progression, Return to sport at 4-8 weeks.
recommended_supplements: Bromelain 500mg (swelling), Vitamin C 1g, Collagen 10g
red_flags: Bony tenderness, inability to bear weight → X-ray to rule out fracture (Ottawa Rules).
source: Ottawa Ankle Rules; JOSPT Ankle Sprain Clinical Practice Guidelines 2021 (variant)

avoid_exercises: Barbell wrist curl, Heavy grip work, Push-ups on extended wrist, Dips, Plank (standard), Heavy deadlift (hook grip).
phase1_rehab: Nerve gliding exercises, Wrist tendon gliding, Fist → full extension sequence. Neutral wrist splinting at night.
phase2_rehab: Wrist flexor stretch (3×30s), Scapular stability, Ergonomic modification, Low-impact cardio.
phase3_return: Fist push-ups, TRX rows, Trap bar deadlift (neutral grip), Gradual barbell introduction.
recommended_supplements: Vitamin B6 100mg, Alpha-lipoic acid 600mg, Fish oil 2g
red_flags: Thenar wasting, severe constant numbness → surgical decompression consult.
source: NICE CTS Guidelines 2023; American Academy of Orthopaedic Surgeons (variant)

avoid_exercises: Heavy squats, Lunges (deep), Running (until pain-free), Seated leg curl, Hip adduction machine.
phase1_rehab: Piriformis stretch (figure-4) 3×30s, Supine hamstring stretch, Hip external rotation stretch, Walking 15-20 min.
phase2_rehab: Clamshell (3×15), Side-lying hip abduction, Glute bridge (single-leg progression), Lateral band walk.
phase3_return: Bodyweight squat, Step-up, Bulgarian split squat (light), Gradual running reintroduction.
recommended_supplements: Magnesium 400mg, Vitamin D3 2000 IU, Fish oil 2g
red_flags: MRI to rule out true disc herniation.
source: JOSPT Piriformis Syndrome Clinical Practice Guidelines 2021 (variant)

phase2_rehab: Nordic hamstring eccentric (3×6 — start assisted), Stability ball curl, Romanian deadlift (bodyweight), Bridging.

avoid_exercises: Deep squats (beyond 90°), Leg extension machine, Running downhill, Lunges, Stair climbing, Plyometrics.
phase1_rehab: RICE protocol, VMO activation (quad sets), Straight leg raise, Short-arc quad, Non-weight-bearing cycling.
phase2_rehab: Mini squat (0-45°), Step-up (low), Hip strengthening (abductors/external rotators), Terminal knee extension.
phase3_return: Wall squat, Bulgarian split squat, Running at flat surface (progressive mileage), Box squat.
recommended_supplements: Glucosamine 1500mg + Chondroitin 1200mg, Collagen 10g + Vitamin C, Omega-3 2g
red_flags: Locking, giving way, significant swelling → MRI to rule out meniscal tear.
source: British Journal of Sports Medicine PFPS Guidelines 2022 (variant)

avoid_exercises: Overhead press, Lateral raise above 90°, Upright row, Behind-neck exercises, Dips (wide arm), Swimming (freestyle intensive).
phase1_rehab: Scapular mobilization, Posterior capsule stretch (cross-body), Sleeper stretch, Anti-inflammatory protocol.
phase2_rehab: Rotator cuff strengthening (internal/external rotation), Serratus anterior activation, Row variations.
phase3_return: Landmine press, Cable shoulder press, Incline bench press, DB lateral raise (below 90°).
recommended_supplements: Omega-3 2-3g, Vitamin D3 2000 IU, Magnesium 300mg
red_flags: Night pain, significant loss of ROM → cortisone + imaging.

avoid_exercises: Bench press, Dips, Push-up, Chest fly, Cable crossover, Pull-over, Heavy overhead press.
phase1_rehab: Ice, Arm sling if Grade II, Pendulum exercises, Gentle shoulder ROM, No active pectoral loading.
phase2_rehab: Band pull-apart, Face pull, Low cable row, Scapular retraction, Light shoulder press.
phase3_return: Push-up, Incline DB press (light), Cable chest fly, Bench press. Gradual at 6-12 weeks.
recommended_supplements: Protein 2.2g/kg, Collagen 10g, Fish oil 3g, Vitamin C 1g
red_flags: Sudden pain + pop + loss of contour → pectoral avulsion → surgical evaluation urgently.
source: AAOS Pectoral Injury Protocol; Sports Health Journal 2021 (variant)

avoid_exercises: All running, Jumping, High-impact cardio, Leg press (loaded), Calf raise. Crutches if pain on walking.
phase1_rehab: Non-weight-bearing with crutches (4-6 weeks), Pool running, Seated upper body work, Bone loading protocol (gentle).
phase2_rehab: Progressive weight-bearing, Pool jogging, Stationary cycling, Elliptical (low impact).
phase3_return: Return-to-run programme at 8-12 weeks (subject to X-ray/MRI clearance). Calcium and Vitamin D optimisation.
recommended_supplements: Calcium 1500mg, Vitamin D3 4000 IU, Vitamin K2 100mcg, Magnesium 400mg
red_flags: Night pain, bilateral tibial pain → DEXA scan (bone density), RED-S assessment.
source: BJSM Stress Fracture Management 2019; Military Orthopaedic Guidelines (variant)

avoid_exercises: Barbell wrist extension, Heavy grip exercises, Wrist curl, Reverse curl, Farmer's carry (heavy), Pull-ups (early).
phase1_rehab: Eccentric wrist extension (Tyler Twist, 3×15), Deep friction massage, Ice after activity, Counterforce brace.
phase2_rehab: Concentric wrist extension (light weight), Forearm pronation/supination, Grip strengthening (light squeezee ball).
phase3_return: Hammer curl, Reverse curl, Pull-up, Farmer's carry. Return at 8-12 weeks.
recommended_supplements: Collagen 15g + Vitamin C 50mg (30 min pre-exercise), Omega-3 3g
red_flags: Persistent pain >3 months → consider PRP injection or shockwave therapy.
source: BJSM Lateral Epicondylitis Guidelines; Nirschl Classification (variant)

phase2_rehab: Isotonic loading: Slow squats (3s concentric/3s eccentric), Spanish squat, Leg press. Gradual loading.
phase3_return: Reactive loading: Box jump (low), Running reintroduction, Sport-specific drills at 12-16 weeks.

injury_name: Lumbar Disc Herniation (L4-L5 or L5-S1) — Variant 122
avoid_exercises: All spinal flexion (crunches, sit-ups, bent-over rows), Deadlift, Heavy squat, Leg press, Twisting movements, Box jumps.
phase1_rehab: McKenzie press-up (prone extension) 3×10, Walking in pool, Supine piriformis stretch, Ice/heat alternation. Consult physio.
phase2_rehab: Prone cobra, Pelvic tilt, Hip flexor stretch, Partial sit-up (only if pain-free). Core stabilization priority.
phase3_return: Gradual introduction of hip hinge pattern, Cable pull-through, Trap bar deadlift at 50% max. 8-12 week timeline.
recommended_supplements: B12 1000mcg (nerve health), Alpha-lipoic acid 600mg, Omega-3 3g, Collagen 10g
red_flags: Foot drop, saddle anaesthesia, bilateral leg weakness → emergency surgery consult.
source: McKenzie Institute; Spine Journal 2022 Conservative Management Guidelines (variant)

avoid_exercises: Deadlift, Barbell Squat, Good Morning, Leg Press (heavy), Hyperextension, Sit-ups

phase2_rehab: Bird-dog (3×10), Glute bridge (3×15), Dead bug (3×10), Walking 20-30 min/day. Avoid loaded flexion.

phase3_return: Fist push-ups, TRX rows, Trap bar deadlift (neutral grip), Gradual barbell introduction.

phase3_return: Dumbbell lateral raise, Cable fly, Landmine press, DB shoulder press (neutral grip), Gradual load increase.
recommended_supplements: Fish oil 3g, Collagen 10g + Vitamin C, Curcumin 1g
red_flags: Inability to raise arm, complete tear on ultrasound → surgical evaluation.

avoid_exercises: Overhead press, Behind-the-neck press, Upright row, Military press, Kipping pull-up, Heavy bench press.
phase1_rehab: Pendulum exercises, Scapular retraction, Active-assisted ROM. RICE. Sling if needed (Grade II).
phase2_rehab: Band external rotation (3×15), Side-lying ER, Scaption, Wall push-up, Face pull (light band).
phase3_return: Dumbbell lateral raise, Cable fly, Landmine press, DB shoulder press (neutral grip), Gradual load increase.

red_flags: Inability to raise arm, complete tear on ultrasound → surgical evaluation.

avoid_exercises: Running (initially), Plyometrics, Box jumps, Skipping rope, Sprint, Deep calf raise (early phase).
phase1_rehab: Isometric calf raise (5×45s, 2-3×/day), No passive stretching (acute phase), Ice after loading.
phase2_rehab: Alfredson eccentric heel drop protocol (3×15, twice daily on step), Concentric calf raise, Swimming.
phase3_return: Running (flat, slow pace), Plyometric introduction at 12 weeks, Full sport at 16-20 weeks.
recommended_supplements: Collagen 15g + Vitamin C 50mg (pre-exercise), Omega-3 3g, Magnesium 400mg
red_flags: Palpable gap, sudden onset severe pain → Thompson test → rule out complete rupture.
source: Alfredson Protocol; NICE Achilles Tendinopathy Guidelines; BJSM 2021 (variant)

avoid_exercises: Running, Jumping, HIIT, Heavy leg press, Box jump, Agility drills, Calf raise (loaded early phase).
phase1_rehab: RICE protocol (48h), Ankle alphabet, Towel scrunches, Seated calf raise, Non-weight-bearing pool walking.
phase2_rehab: Single-leg balance (30s), BOSU balance, Theraband dorsiflexion, Calf raise (bilateral), Partial jogging.
phase3_return: Lateral band walks, Agility ladder, Plyometric progression, Return to sport at 4-8 weeks.
recommended_supplements: Bromelain 500mg (swelling), Vitamin C 1g, Collagen 10g
red_flags: Bony tenderness, inability to bear weight → X-ray to rule out fracture (Ottawa Rules).
source: Ottawa Ankle Rules; JOSPT Ankle Sprain Clinical Practice Guidelines 2021 (variant)

avoid_exercises: Plyometrics, Heavy loaded squats, Leg extension machine, Running, Jumping rope, Hill sprints.
phase1_rehab: Isometric leg press or wall squat (70% MVC, 5×45s, 5×/week). Ice after activity. Load reduction 50%.
phase2_rehab: Isotonic loading: Slow squats (3s concentric/3s eccentric), Spanish squat, Leg press. Gradual loading.
phase3_return: Reactive loading: Box jump (low), Running reintroduction, Sport-specific drills at 12-16 weeks.
recommended_supplements: Collagen 15g + Vitamin C 50mg (30 min pre-exercise), Omega-3 3g, Protein >1.8g/kg
red_flags: Central tendon thickening, partial rupture on ultrasound → physio-guided management.
source: Cook & Purdam Tendinopathy Model; BJSM Patellar Tendinopathy Review 2022 (variant)

avoid_exercises: Deadlift, Barbell Squat, Good Morning, Leg Press (heavy), Hyperextension, Sit-ups
phase1_rehab: Rest 24-48h. Ice 15-20 min every 2-3h. Gentle knee-to-chest stretches (3×20s). Cat-cow mobility (3×10 reps). Diaphragmatic breathing.
phase2_rehab: Bird-dog (3×10), Glute bridge (3×15), Dead bug (3×10), Walking 20-30 min/day. Avoid loaded flexion.
phase3_return: Bodyweight squat, Romanian deadlift with light weight, Progressive loading over 4-6 weeks.
recommended_supplements: Magnesium glycinate 400mg (muscle relaxation), Turmeric 500mg (anti-inflammatory), Fish oil 2-3g EPA+DHA
red_flags: Pain radiating below knee, bladder/bowel dysfunction → immediate medical attention.
source: ACSM Guidelines; Physiopedia Lower Back Pain Protocol (variant)

avoid_exercises: Heavy squats, Lunges (deep), Running (until pain-free), Seated leg curl, Hip adduction machine.
phase1_rehab: Piriformis stretch (figure-4) 3×30s, Supine hamstring stretch, Hip external rotation stretch, Walking 15-20 min.
phase2_rehab: Clamshell (3×15), Side-lying hip abduction, Glute bridge (single-leg progression), Lateral band walk.
phase3_return: Bodyweight squat, Step-up, Bulgarian split squat (light), Gradual running reintroduction.
recommended_supplements: Magnesium 400mg, Vitamin D3 2000 IU, Fish oil 2g
red_flags: MRI to rule out true disc herniation.
source: JOSPT Piriformis Syndrome Clinical Practice Guidelines 2021 (variant)

avoid_exercises: High-intensity training, Competition, Heavy lifting, All structured training initially.
phase1_rehab: Complete rest or active recovery only (leisurely walking, yoga). Sleep 9+ hours. Caloric surplus.
phase2_rehab: Light cardio (RPE 3-4), Mobility work, Meditation, Social activity, Gradual return to volume at 30% of baseline.
phase3_return: Progressive volume increase (10% weekly), Periodization with mandatory deload weeks, Heart rate variability (HRV) monitoring.
recommended_supplements: Ashwagandha 600mg (cortisol regulation), Zinc 25mg, Magnesium 400mg, Protein 2g/kg, Vitamin D3
red_flags: Resting HR elevated >10 bpm above baseline for >2 weeks, mood disturbances → GP evaluation.
source: European College of Sport Science OTS Consensus 2012; BJSM 2020 Update (variant)

avoid_exercises: Overhead press, Lateral raise above 90°, Upright row, Behind-neck exercises, Dips (wide arm), Swimming (freestyle intensive).
phase1_rehab: Scapular mobilization, Posterior capsule stretch (cross-body), Sleeper stretch, Anti-inflammatory protocol.
phase2_rehab: Rotator cuff strengthening (internal/external rotation), Serratus anterior activation, Row variations.
phase3_return: Landmine press, Cable shoulder press, Incline bench press, DB lateral raise (below 90°).
recommended_supplements: Omega-3 2-3g, Vitamin D3 2000 IU, Magnesium 300mg
red_flags: Night pain, significant loss of ROM → cortisone + imaging.

phase1_rehab: Isometric calf raise (5×45s, 2-3×/day), No passive stretching (acute phase), Ice after loading.
phase2_rehab: Alfredson eccentric heel drop protocol (3×15, twice daily on step), Concentric calf raise, Swimming.
phase3_return: Running (flat, slow pace), Plyometric introduction at 12 weeks, Full sport at 16-20 weeks.
recommended_supplements: Collagen 15g + Vitamin C 50mg (pre-exercise), Omega-3 3g, Magnesium 400mg
red_flags: Palpable gap, sudden onset severe pain → Thompson test → rule out complete rupture.
source: Alfredson Protocol; NICE Achilles Tendinopathy Guidelines; BJSM 2021 (variant)

avoid_exercises: Running (barefoot/minimalist), Box jumps, Skipping, Walking on hard surfaces (prolonged), Calf raise on incline.
phase1_rehab: Plantar fascia stretch (3×30s morning), Towel toe curls, Calf eccentric drops, Ice rolling (frozen water bottle).
phase2_rehab: Intrinsic foot strengthening (short foot exercise), Calf raise eccentric (3×15), Single-leg balance, Low-impact cardio.
phase3_return: Running with supportive footwear, Gradual mileage increase (10% rule), Soft surface running.
recommended_supplements: Vitamin D3 2000 IU, Magnesium 400mg, Collagen 10g
red_flags: Sharp pain at night, sudden worsening → rule out stress fracture or nerve entrapment.
source: NICE Plantar Fasciitis Guidelines; Journal of Foot and Ankle Research 2022 (variant)

avoid_exercises: All running, Jumping, High-impact cardio, Leg press (loaded), Calf raise. Crutches if pain on walking.
phase1_rehab: Non-weight-bearing with crutches (4-6 weeks), Pool running, Seated upper body work, Bone loading protocol (gentle).
phase2_rehab: Progressive weight-bearing, Pool jogging, Stationary cycling, Elliptical (low impact).
phase3_return: Return-to-run programme at 8-12 weeks (subject to X-ray/MRI clearance). Calcium and Vitamin D optimisation.
recommended_supplements: Calcium 1500mg, Vitamin D3 4000 IU, Vitamin K2 100mcg, Magnesium 400mg
red_flags: Night pain, bilateral tibial pain → DEXA scan (bone density), RED-S assessment.
source: BJSM Stress Fracture Management 2019; Military Orthopaedic Guidelines (variant)

avoid_exercises: Heavy asymmetric loading (e.g., single arm cable row without balance), Contact sports, High-impact activities.
phase1_rehab: Schroth method exercises (personalized breathing + positioning), Core stabilization, Swimming.
phase2_rehab: Bilateral symmetrical loading preferred, Lat pull-down (double grip), Leg press, Plank, Glute bridge.
phase3_return: Deadlift with monitoring, Squat, Pull-up (avoid over-rotation). Regular physio check-ins.
recommended_supplements: Calcium 1200mg, Vitamin D3 3000 IU, Magnesium 400mg
red_flags: Cobb angle >25° → orthopaedic review, bracing consideration.
source: SOSORT Scoliosis Exercise Guidelines 2022 (variant)

avoid_exercises: Deep knee flexion, Twisting on planted foot, Running, Jumping, Squatting beyond 90°, Leg curl.
phase1_rehab: Ice, compression, elevation. Quad sets, Straight leg raise, Stationary cycling (high seat), Pool walking.
phase2_rehab: Mini squat, Step-up, Leg press (limited range), Hip strengthening. Avoid pivoting.
phase3_return: Full squat (if pain-free), Jogging (week 8-12), Return to sport at 12-16 weeks.
recommended_supplements: Glucosamine sulfate 1500mg, Collagen 10g, Boswellia 300mg
red_flags: Locking, inability to extend, persistent effusion → surgery consult.
source: Cochrane Review on Meniscal Tears 2020; Orthopedics Today (variant)

avoid_exercises: Running, Jumping, HIIT, Heavy leg press, Box jump, Agility drills, Calf raise (loaded early phase).
phase1_rehab: RICE protocol (48h), Ankle alphabet, Towel scrunches, Seated calf raise, Non-weight-bearing pool walking.
phase2_rehab: Single-leg balance (30s), BOSU balance, Theraband dorsiflexion, Calf raise (bilateral), Partial jogging.
phase3_return: Lateral band walks, Agility ladder, Plyometric progression, Return to sport at 4-8 weeks.
recommended_supplements: Bromelain 500mg (swelling), Vitamin C 1g, Collagen 10g
red_flags: Bony tenderness, inability to bear weight → X-ray to rule out fracture (Ottawa Rules).
source: Ottawa Ankle Rules; JOSPT Ankle Sprain Clinical Practice Guidelines 2021 (variant)

avoid_exercises: Running, Sprint, Leg raise, Sit-up, Cycling (high resistance), Step-up, Deep lunge.
phase1_rehab: Standing hip flexor stretch (3×30s), Supine knee to chest, Heat after 48h, Gentle walking.
phase2_rehab: Bridge, Clamshell, Side-lying hip abduction, Dead bug (gentle), Stationary cycling (low resistance).
phase3_return: Lunge, Step-up, Squat, Running reintroduction at 4-6 weeks.
recommended_supplements: Protein 2g/kg, Omega-3 2g, Turmeric 500mg
red_flags: Snapping hip, pain with all movements → MRI to rule out labral tear.
source: Physiopedia Hip Flexor Strain; ACSM Sports Injury Guidelines (variant)

avoid_exercises: Sumo squat, Wide-stance squat, Hip adduction machine, Lateral lunge, Running (side-to-side), Soccer kicks.
phase1_rehab: RICE, Isometric adductor squeeze (pillow between knees), Gentle walking, Aquatic therapy.
phase2_rehab: Copenhagen adductor exercise (3×10), Side-lying adduction, Mini sumo squat, Light lateral lunge.
phase3_return: Sumo deadlift, Cossack squat, Lateral agility drills, Sport-specific training at 6-10 weeks.
recommended_supplements: Collagen 10g, Vitamin C 500mg, Omega-3 2g
red_flags: Inguinal hernia symptoms (bulge), osteitis pubis → specialist referral.
source: JOSPT Groin Pain Guidelines; Doha Groin Consensus 2015 (variant)

avoid_exercises: Barbell wrist extension, Heavy grip exercises, Wrist curl, Reverse curl, Farmer's carry (heavy), Pull-ups (early).
phase1_rehab: Eccentric wrist extension (Tyler Twist, 3×15), Deep friction massage, Ice after activity, Counterforce brace.
phase2_rehab: Concentric wrist extension (light weight), Forearm pronation/supination, Grip strengthening (light squeezee ball).
phase3_return: Hammer curl, Reverse curl, Pull-up, Farmer's carry. Return at 8-12 weeks.
recommended_supplements: Collagen 15g + Vitamin C 50mg (30 min pre-exercise), Omega-3 3g
red_flags: Persistent pain >3 months → consider PRP injection or shockwave therapy.
source: BJSM Lateral Epicondylitis Guidelines; Nirschl Classification (variant)

avoid_exercises: Overhead press, Behind-the-neck press, Upright row, Military press, Kipping pull-up, Heavy bench press.
phase1_rehab: Pendulum exercises, Scapular retraction, Active-assisted ROM. RICE. Sling if needed (Grade II).
phase2_rehab: Band external rotation (3×15), Side-lying ER, Scaption, Wall push-up, Face pull (light band).
phase3_return: Dumbbell lateral raise, Cable fly, Landmine press, DB shoulder press (neutral grip), Gradual load increase.
recommended_supplements: Fish oil 3g, Collagen 10g + Vitamin C, Curcumin 1g
red_flags: Inability to raise arm, complete tear on ultrasound → surgical evaluation.
source: AAOS Rotator Cuff Guidelines; JOSPT Shoulder Protocol 2021 (variant)

avoid_exercises: Heavy barbell curls, Preacher curl, Chin-ups (early), Overhead pulling with flexion, Hammer curl (heavy).
phase1_rehab: Eccentric bicep curl (slow 3-4s lowering, 3×15), Supination exercise, Pendulum, Scapular stabilization.
phase2_rehab: Band curl, Incline DB curl, Neutral grip pull-down, Concentric-eccentric loading progression.
phase3_return: Barbell curl, Weighted chin-up, Cable curl. Full return at 8-12 weeks.
recommended_supplements: Collagen 10g, Vitamin C 1000mg, Protein 2g/kg
red_flags: Popeye deformity (proximal biceps rupture) → surgical consult.
source: Physiopedia Biceps Tendinopathy; JOSPT Upper Extremity Protocol (variant)

avoid_exercises: High-intensity training, Competition, Heavy lifting, All structured training initially.
phase1_rehab: Complete rest or active recovery only (leisurely walking, yoga). Sleep 9+ hours. Caloric surplus.
phase2_rehab: Light cardio (RPE 3-4), Mobility work, Meditation, Social activity, Gradual return to volume at 30% of baseline.
phase3_return: Progressive volume increase (10% weekly), Periodization with mandatory deload weeks, Heart rate variability (HRV) monitoring.
recommended_supplements: Ashwagandha 600mg (cortisol regulation), Zinc 25mg, Magnesium 400mg, Protein 2g/kg, Vitamin D3
red_flags: Resting HR elevated >10 bpm above baseline for >2 weeks, mood disturbances → GP evaluation.
source: European College of Sport Science OTS Consensus 2012; BJSM 2020 Update (variant)

avoid_exercises: Heavy barbell curls, Preacher curl, Chin-ups (early), Overhead pulling with flexion, Hammer curl (heavy).
phase1_rehab: Eccentric bicep curl (slow 3-4s lowering, 3×15), Supination exercise, Pendulum, Scapular stabilization.
phase2_rehab: Band curl, Incline DB curl, Neutral grip pull-down, Concentric-eccentric loading progression.
phase3_return: Barbell curl, Weighted chin-up, Cable curl. Full return at 8-12 weeks.
recommended_supplements: Collagen 10g, Vitamin C 1000mg, Protein 2g/kg
red_flags: Popeye deformity (proximal biceps rupture) → surgical consult.

avoid_exercises: Overhead press, Lateral raise above 90°, Upright row, Behind-neck exercises, Dips (wide arm), Swimming (freestyle intensive).
phase1_rehab: Scapular mobilization, Posterior capsule stretch (cross-body), Sleeper stretch, Anti-inflammatory protocol.
phase2_rehab: Rotator cuff strengthening (internal/external rotation), Serratus anterior activation, Row variations.
phase3_return: Landmine press, Cable shoulder press, Incline bench press, DB lateral raise (below 90°).
recommended_supplements: Omega-3 2-3g, Vitamin D3 2000 IU, Magnesium 300mg
red_flags: Night pain, significant loss of ROM → cortisone + imaging.
source: Neer Classification; British Shoulder & Elbow Society Guidelines (variant)

avoid_exercises: Behind-neck press, Behind-neck lat pull-down, Neck bridges, Headstand, Heavy shrugs, Overhead pressing with neck tension.
phase1_rehab: Cervical retraction (chin tucks, 10×10/day), Neck rotation (active), Scapular squeezes, Heat, Postural correction.
phase2_rehab: Band face pull, Prone cobra, Deep neck flexor strengthening, Chin tuck on incline, Gentle cardio.
phase3_return: Shoulder press (neutral, dumbbell), Pull-up, Deadlift with neutral neck, Gradual heavy loading.
recommended_supplements: Vitamin D3 3000 IU, Calcium 1000mg, Omega-3 2g, B12 1000mcg
red_flags: Arm weakness, electric shock sensation on neck flexion (Lhermitte sign) → MRI immediately.

avoid_exercises: Barbell wrist curl, Heavy grip work, Push-ups on extended wrist, Dips, Plank (standard), Heavy deadlift (hook grip).
phase1_rehab: Nerve gliding exercises, Wrist tendon gliding, Fist → full extension sequence. Neutral wrist splinting at night.
phase2_rehab: Wrist flexor stretch (3×30s), Scapular stability, Ergonomic modification, Low-impact cardio.
phase3_return: Fist push-ups, TRX rows, Trap bar deadlift (neutral grip), Gradual barbell introduction.
recommended_supplements: Vitamin B6 100mg, Alpha-lipoic acid 600mg, Fish oil 2g
red_flags: Thenar wasting, severe constant numbness → surgical decompression consult.
source: NICE CTS Guidelines 2023; American Academy of Orthopaedic Surgeons (variant)

avoid_exercises: Plyometrics, Heavy loaded squats, Leg extension machine, Running, Jumping rope, Hill sprints.
phase1_rehab: Isometric leg press or wall squat (70% MVC, 5×45s, 5×/week). Ice after activity. Load reduction 50%.
phase2_rehab: Isotonic loading: Slow squats (3s concentric/3s eccentric), Spanish squat, Leg press. Gradual loading.
phase3_return: Reactive loading: Box jump (low), Running reintroduction, Sport-specific drills at 12-16 weeks.
recommended_supplements: Collagen 15g + Vitamin C 50mg (30 min pre-exercise), Omega-3 3g, Protein >1.8g/kg
red_flags: Central tendon thickening, partial rupture on ultrasound → physio-guided management.

avoid_exercises: Deadlift, Barbell Squat, Good Morning, Leg Press (heavy), Hyperextension, Sit-ups
phase1_rehab: Rest 24-48h. Ice 15-20 min every 2-3h. Gentle knee-to-chest stretches (3×20s). Cat-cow mobility (3×10 reps). Diaphragmatic breathing.
phase2_rehab: Bird-dog (3×10), Glute bridge (3×15), Dead bug (3×10), Walking 20-30 min/day. Avoid loaded flexion.
phase3_return: Bodyweight squat, Romanian deadlift with light weight, Progressive loading over 4-6 weeks.
recommended_supplements: Magnesium glycinate 400mg (muscle relaxation), Turmeric 500mg (anti-inflammatory), Fish oil 2-3g EPA+DHA
red_flags: Pain radiating below knee, bladder/bowel dysfunction → immediate medical attention.
